daily_memo.title: Daily Investment Research Memo - May 18, 2026
daily_memo.as_of: May 18, 2026 4:44 PM PT - report controls added
daily_memo.summary: The market read was selective, not broad-risk-on: indexes were stable, semiconductor breadth was weak, and NVDA had not reclaimed the $237.57 trade reference. The key risk controls were NVDA entry-zone logic, H200/China execution risk, FOMC-minutes optionality, and AI power-demand M&A.

market_read.headline: Indexes stable, semis not confirming; NVDA below the $237.57 reference.
market_read.summary: NVDA was a bounce attempt rather than a confirmed turnaround. Accessible quotes around $224.72-$226.10 were below the $237.57 reference, with SMH/AMD/AVGO/MU breadth mixed-to-negative.
